reviews.review_msg: Not sure about the student's experience with her in BUS 345, but I had a great experience with her in 493. She was very accommodating and supportive to us students to adapt to online learning. She gave us interesting HBR cases to read. She was always helpful and caring to us students. Grading was beyond fair.

She actually didnt lecture the entire semester, it was a special topics class and each week a group would present or a guest lecturer would come in. Her grading is beyond fair and it was the easiest A I have ever gotten. She is genuinely a great person.
AMAZING! Don't leave SFU without taking her Creativity in Business course. This is her specialty - and it shows. Should be a required course in Business!
